meta.title: Turn First-pass PRDs into Approved Implementation Plans
meta.description: ClosedLoop.AI turns product intent into a durable, team-reviewed plan that engineers can approve and execute. Stop rebuilding context across handoffs. Ship faster on real, existing codebases.

features.title: The missing step between PRD and build
features.description: ClosedLoop.AI makes Implementation Plans a first-class artifact: generated from your inputs, reviewed by your team, approved with clear ownership, and saved as the system of record.

items.title: Generate the Implementation Plan
items.description: Start from a PRD or a lightweight issue. ClosedLoop.AI generates a structured Implementation Plan using your repo context, so the plan is explicit and ready for review.

items.title: Review and approve, fast
items.description: Assign a final approver, collect edits, and move Draft to Approved. Plans become shared context for humans and agents, not disposable chat output.

items.title: Immutable versions, forever
items.description: Every save creates a preserved version. Keep the full history of PRDs and plans so teams can trace decisions, reuse context, and diagnose failures when output is wrong.

items.title: Right-sized workflows
items.description: Pick a preset workflow for the work at hand. Run lean for quick fixes or add gates for higher stakes work. Human touchpoints are explicit, owned, and tracked.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.description: Clear answers for teams who want to move fast.

items.question: What makes ClosedLoop.AI different from using an AI chat to plan work?
items.answer: ClosedLoop.AI turns planning into a shared, durable artifact. Plans are saved, versioned, reviewed, and approved as a team. That means less context loss, fewer mismatches with the PRD, and a single source of truth that humans and agents can reuse.

items.question: Can ClosedLoop.AI start from something smaller than a full PRD?
items.answer: Yes. ClosedLoop.AI supports lightweight inputs for small units of work, like bugs and quick fixes. You can start a workflow from an issue-sized artifact, generate the plan automatically, and only add rigor when the work demands it.

items.question: How do approvals work?
items.answer: Artifacts move from Draft to Approved with a clearly assigned final approver. In workflows, stages can be owned by a human or an agent. Human-owned stages pause for review and can be approved, approved with comments, or rejected.

items.question: Do you keep history, or do plans get overwritten?
items.answer: ClosedLoop.AI preserves every version. Each save creates a new immutable revision, so you can always reference prior decisions, reuse past context, and see how the plan evolved as the team learned.

items.question: Who is ClosedLoop.AI for?
items.answer: Teams building on real codebases where context matters. Especially product managers and engineering leads at small companies who want a lightweight way to turn intent into approved plans, then move quickly with confidence.

cta.title: Make the plan the source of truth
cta.description: Stop losing context between product and engineering. Generate a plan, review it quickly, approve it, and move. ClosedLoop.AI makes AI-assisted development work on brownfield codebases because the handoff is explicit, durable, and reusable.
cta.secondaryDescription: Loved by teams building on real codebases

meta.title: AI-Powered Software Delivery | Claude Code Plugins
meta.description: Generate custom AI agents from your codebase. Ship production-ready code with 13 quality judges, cross-repo orchestration, and a learning system that improves every run.

hero.title: AI-Powered Software
hero.description: Generate custom AI agents from your codebase. Ship production-ready code with 13 quality judges, cross-repo orchestration, and a learning system that improves every run.

features.label: Features
features.title: Bootstrap, Plan, Ship
features.description: ClosedLoop analyzes your repo, generates project-specific agents, and orchestrates end-to-end delivery with quality judges at every step.

items.title: Brownfield Bootstrapping
items.description: Analyze your existing codebase to auto-generate custom domain-expert agents tailored to your stack. Detects languages, frameworks, and architecture patterns to create agents that understand your project.

items.title: PRD-to-Code Planning
items.description: Pre-Explorer analyzes your codebase, Plan Draft Writer creates implementation plans from PRDs, and Plan Writer refines them with critic feedback. Full requirements traceability from start to finish.

items.title: 13 Quality Judges
items.description: Automated evaluation agents for SOLID principles, DRY, KISS, readability, test quality, code organization, and technical accuracy. Every plan and implementation is scored before shipping.

items.title: Cross-Repo Orchestration
items.description: Automatically discovers peer repositories and identifies cross-repo dependencies. Generates cross-repo PRDs for missing capabilities and coordinates changes across your entire stack.

items.title: Learning System
items.description: Captures patterns from every run and validates them for quality. Push learnings to your org, pull shared patterns, and track goal performance across runs.

items.title: Visual QA
items.description: Built-in Playwright browser automation for visual QA inspection. Catch UI regressions, verify layouts, and validate user flows without manual testing.
